Forgot Password feature

Changed only the Success to true parameter

Password reset link got delivered to another account

No token binding
No ownership validation
Just trust

Sometimes account takeover

starts with a single overlooked parameter

Tested a live target's search functionality- captured requests in Burp Suite and began tracing how user input is handled between the client, application and security controls.

Observed modified search requests triggered a WAF block, which shifted the focus
